message:
feat(metrics): implement CPU and memory metrics collection

- Add GetMachineConfig to Firecracker API client to read memory/vcpu config
- Track vcpu exit deltas over time to estimate CPU activity
- Cache machine config per VM to avoid repeated API calls
- Add CleanupTask to remove state when VMs stop
- Memory shows configured allocation (can't see inside VM without agent)
